hero.subheadline: The modern directory of Latin professionals and businesses. From freelancers to large companies, all in one place.

features.visibility_body: Show up in local searches and get found by the Latin community across NZ.
features.leads_body: Receive direct WhatsApp contacts from people looking for your service.
features.community_body: Be part of a network that values and supports Latin businesses.

footer: Latino Connect — Made for the Latin community in New Zealand.
footer_tagline: The platform connecting the Latin community with the best businesses and services in New Zealand.
footer_made_with: Made with ❤️ for the Latin community in NZ.

register.title: Join our network
register.subtitle: Start free on the Starter package. Upgrade whenever you're ready.

plans.title: The right package to grow
plans.subtitle: Start free and unlock advanced features as your presence grows.
plans.page_subheading: Start free and scale up as your business grows within the Latin community in New Zealand.

about.title: Connecting the Latin community in NZ
about.body: Latino Connect Hub was born from the desire to make the Latin community more visible, strong and prosperous in New Zealand. We connect people looking for services with businesses and professionals who speak their language and understand their culture.
about.mission_body: Empower Latin entrepreneurs and facilitate access to services for our community.
about.vision_body: To be the leading reference for Latin businesses across New Zealand.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions, suggestions or want to partner with us? Our team is ready to connect you with the Latin community.
contact.field_message_placeholder: How can we help you today?
contact.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We'll respond within 24 business hours.
contact.cta_body: We are the largest connection platform for Latin American entrepreneurs, professionals and organisations in the Pacific.

blog.title: Community news
blog.subtitle: Visas, finances, settling in and stories from the Latin community in NZ.
blog.placeholder_body: This is placeholder content. The full article will be published soon with practical and up-to-date information for the Latin community in New Zealand.
blog.placeholder_cta: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates on visas, job opportunities, financial tips and community stories.
blog.coming_soon_desc: We are crafting amazing stories, useful guides, and community news for Latinos in New Zealand. Stay tuned for our upcoming releases!
